instruction: The currency pound icon is missing a thin black frame circle. Add one back around the icon (circle cx=64, cy=64, r=60, fill none, stroke #222, stroke-width 1).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-pound.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.121 7.629A3 3 0 0 0 9.017 9.43c-.023.212-.002.425.028.636l.506 3.541a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-.43 2.65L9 16.5l1.539-.513a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 1.422 0l.655.218a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 1.718-.122L15 15.75M8.25 12H12m9 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-pound.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.121 7.629A3 3 0 0 0 9.017 9.43c-.023.212-.002.425.028.636l.506 3.541a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-.43 2.65L9 16.5l1.539-.513a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 1.422 0l.655.218a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 1.718-.122L15 15.75M8.25 12H12m9 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
